# Petrophysical Characterization

**Summary**: The measurement and analysis of physical properties of rocks, such as porosity and pore size distribution.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-aslanov|Aslanov, 2021]] performed petrophysical characterization to determine the degree of confinement in the porous matrix.

## Key Results and Findings

- Porosity for kerogen II D was 14.885%, while it decreased with the addition of asphaltene due to pore-filling effects. ([[2021-aslanov|Aslanov, 2021, p. 55]])
